posts.author: Casey_M (Casey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Requesting improvement in Tab key navigation between columns/fields when working in a board or project. The buggy behavior I’m describing occurs with the Dropdown column type. The process I’m requesting currently works in the Person and Status column fields.
Screen Recording example: Feature Request Enhanced Na...

Steps to recreate:

  1. Enter a main record title
  2. tab to the next field (a Dropdown column)
  3. hit ‘Enter’ to select that field.
    It lets you CREATE a new label, but when I try to find an existing one by starting to type, it just shows me the options. I cannot use the arrow keys to move down to the option and select it. Even if I hit Tab again, at this point, it’s stuck in that field and just allows me to EDIT the fields, not select it and move on like I want. So I have to manually click the selection with my mouse. I’m then stuck from tabbing to the next field, so I have to click yet again.

What are you trying to achieve

Less interruption of my keyboard flow by not needing to click my mouse, and then re-click in a new field in order to continue tabbing through the fields and columns.

With dropdown fields, if they could mirror the functionality of Person and Status columns, that would be amazing.
Ideal:
To be able to tab to the next field, start typing an option for the field (either one of the statuses, person’s name or a dropdown option) and be able to use the arrow keys to get to the option in question, click ‘enter’ to accept it, and then continue tabbing through the fields.
